prompt: The attached reference is a vintage voucher; its peony flower illustration shows the ENGRAVING STYLE and subject to match. Draw a single ornamental peony bloom with leaves as a hand-tinted chromolithograph spot illustration in that engraving style, in NATURAL true-to-life colors: soft blush-pink and coral petals with deeper rose at the center, fresh muted green leaves. The illustration sits on a clean PLAIN WHITE background with nothing else. IMPORTANT: no yellow or gold color cast anywhere - colors must look correct as if printed on white paper. Wide horizontal composition: the bloom centered with leaves spreading symmetrically left and right, suitable as a bottom ornament. No border, no frame, no text, no background color, no shadow. Warm ochre-sepia engraved linework with natural hand-tinted flat color washes. Flat traditional print illustration, no photorealism.
